title: ononis tridentata var. angustifolia
intro: Ononis tridentata var. angustifolia, also known as narrow-leaved restharrow, is a flowering plant species within the legume family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The narrow-leaved restharrow is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating joint pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas and infusions, to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
